description: Postcondition visibility: `build_step_done` events already carry `violations` array from `response.violations` in `build.js`. Render in MessageCard: check name, pass/fail icon, violation detail (expandable). Currently opaque — user sees "step done" but not what was verified.

completions.notes: Stale-row reconcile (sweep 2026-06-16). Postcondition visibility shipped (6737afc): build_step_done violations[] rendered via StepOutcome → expandable ViolationDetail. feature.json never reconciled from PLANNED.
